offer: For clinic managers processing 5–15 timesheets/month, inaccurate submissions cause payroll errors. We automate timesheet validations instead of manual timesheet review and validation.
problem: Inaccurate timesheet submissions leading to payroll errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for clinic managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to clinic managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among managers
try_it: Let users flag discrepancies and generate validation reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
